data.title: Shopify adds B2B features for DTC merchants
data.description: B2B features have "consistently been one of the most requested capabilities from non-Plus merchants," according to Shopify.

data.title: Aldi U.S. to exclusively use Instacart for ecommerce fulfillment
data.description: The news comes months after Aldi joined the Uber Eats delivery platform in September. Aldi is still available via Uber Eats, but the retailer uses Instacart for its owned ecommerce channels.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Visa and Mastercard are approaching agentic commerce
data.description: The two payments giants are competitors, but Visa and Mastercard have common allies in their agentic commerce aspirations.

data.title: QXO completes Kodiak Building Partners acquisition
data.description: The companies first announced the deal in February. QXO acquired Kodiak from Court Square Capital Partners for about $2.25 billion.

data.title: Home Depot names a new CTO
data.description: Franziska Bell comes to Home Depot's CTO role with a background in AI and technology from Ford, BP and Uber.
